audience_policies.source_phrase: This pass admits up to 2 adults and 2 children at 1/2 price. This is a coupon pass and doesn't need to be returned to the Library. You may pick up this pass from the Library up to 1 week in advance. You save by using this pass! Admission without this pass is: Adults: $24.00 Senio
